description: Registry of all T4H platform widgets. Machine-readable. Every widget folder must have an entry here.

widgets.name: stat-card
widgets.description: Single KPI stat card with label, value, delta, and trend sparkline

widgets.name: feed-list
widgets.description: Scrollable list of ingestion records or activity items

widgets.name: tenant-switcher
widgets.description: Dropdown to switch between tenants for multi-tenant admin users

widgets.name: ingestion-status
widgets.description: Live status panel showing ingestion source health and last run

widgets.name: output-log
widgets.description: Audit-style log of output runs and sweep confirmations

widgets.name: template-picker
widgets.description: Template selection and variable injection UI

widgets.name: branding-editor
widgets.description: White-label branding config editor — logo, colours, fonts, domain

widgets.name: sweep-monitor
widgets.description: Shows pending, swept, and failed outputs. Confirms the-pen has received each output.
